Finished working

Previous attempt failed: Follow-up dispatch did not launch (dispatch_not_started). Fix the issue and continue implementation.

Finished working
JSON
{
  "planText": "I will first validate and restore follow-up dispatch startup flow, include the QA reliability probe as a verification step, and then proceed with the core implementation path once dispatch is confirmed working.",
  "tasks": [
    {
      "stableTaskId": "reproduce-dispatch-not-started",
      "title": "Reproduce dispatch_not_started failure",
      "description": "Trace the follow-up dispatch path end-to-end to identify where launch is skipped or aborted (queueing trigger, worker startup, gating conditions, and error handling).",
      "acceptance": [
        "A deterministic repro path for dispatch_not_started is documented",
        "Root cause is identified with precise failing component and condition"
      ]
    },
    {
      "stableTaskId": "fix-followup-dispatch-start",
      "title": "Fix follow-up dispatch startup logic",
      "description": "Implement a targeted fix so follow-up dispatch reliably launches when requested, including guard-condition corrections and resilient startup/error transitions.",
      "acceptance": [
        "Follow-up dispatch starts successfully for previously failing scenario",
        "No regression in normal dispatch flow",
        "Relevant automated checks pass"
      ]
    },
    {
      "stableTaskId": "qa-reliability-probe",
      "title": "Run temporary-file reliability probe",
      "description": "Create and remove tmp-delivery-loop-probe.txt at repo root as a probe to verify command execution reliability in the loop, then confirm completion in status output.",
      "acceptance": [
        "tmp-delivery-loop-probe.txt is created during probe",
        "tmp-delivery-loop-probe.txt is removed afterward",
        "Completion is explicitly reported"
      ]
    },
    {
      "stableTaskId": "continue-implementation",
      "title": "Resume and complete implementation after dispatch fix",
      "description": "Proceed with remaining implementation tasks blocked by dispatch startup, then run validation and summarize delivered changes and verification results.",
      "acceptance": [
        "Blocked implementation steps are completed",
        "Validation results are recorded",
        "Final status includes what was fixed and verified"
      ]
    }
  ]
}

13s · 1 turn

Continue implementation.

Finished working

Implemented the dispatch fix and continued the plan.

What changed
Updated follow-up queue handling so dispatchLaunched: false is treated as a recoverable dispatch failure (not a terminal no-op), for both batch and slash-command paths.
On non-launched dispatch, it now:
restores queued messages for retry
schedules durable retry via existing retry pipeline
returns retry-oriented outcomes (dispatch_retry_scheduled / related failure states)

Files:

process-follow-up-queue.ts
process-follow-up-queue.test.ts
QA probe
Created and removed tmp-delivery-loop-probe.txt in repo root.
Probe status: completed (probe_complete).
Validation
Dependencies: installed with pnpm install (node_modules was missing).
Lint: passed via pnpm -r --if-present lint.
Typecheck: passed via pnpm tsc-check.
Targeted tests: attempted pnpm -C apps/www test src/server-lib/process-follow-up-queue.test.ts, but blocked in this environment because Docker is unavailable (docker: not found) and test global setup requires Docker Compose.
5m 42s · 1 turn

Continue gate check.

Files Changed
2
+125
-8
Finished working

Findings

No blocking findings.

Deep Review Notes

Reviewed the non-launch dispatch paths in process-follow-up-queue.ts (slash and batch branches around the startAgentMessage calls).
Verified architecture behavior is now consistent:
if dispatch launches: success path returns dispatch_started_*
if dispatch does not launch: queue is restored and retry is persisted through handleFollowUpFailure
fallback ownership path (ensureDispatchRetryPersistenceOwnership) still protects retry persistence failures
Reviewed test coverage in process-follow-up-queue.test.ts:
batch non-launch retry case covered
slash non-launch retry case covered
existing retry and fallback persistence cases remain covered

Gate Status

review_gate: pass (zero blocking findings).
Residual environment limitation (non-blocking): targeted test execution in this container still requires Docker (docker: not found). Lint and typecheck previously passed.
37s · 1 turn

Sandbox failed to start

No GitHub access token found
